goals.objective: Check off all 40 next-level-swarm-skills-specialists tasks with evidence.
acceptance_criteria: All 40 G14 tasks checked off in next-level-swarm-skills-specialists/tasks.md.
openspec validate next-level-swarm-skills-specialists --strict exits 0.

goals.objective: OKF path allowlisting, scoped permissions, secret-like detector, evidence-ref resolver.
acceptance_criteria: OKF drift/sync constrained to configured roots.
Broad create:task replaced with scoped permissions.
Secret-like detector on all mutating endpoints.
Tests for path escape refusal, secret rejection, scoped permission refusal.

goals.objective: Split candidate creation from validated promotion with evidence refs.
acceptance_criteria: createCandidate and promoteCapability are separate methods.
Promotion requires evidence refs, eval scorecard, owner, version, risk ceiling.
High/critical promotion requires security checker + human approval.

goals.objective: EnforcementDecisionService resolving persisted refs, wired into all mutating actions.
acceptance_criteria: No spoofable governance booleans accepted.
Enforcement integrated into verifyLoopRun, completeLoopRun, startNextWorker, drain, stop/kill, memory promotion.
Trace spans written for each enforcement decision.

goals.objective: Typed claim fields, explicit contradiction edges, evidence-ref resolution before promotion.
acceptance_criteria: Claims have predicate, object, scope, valid_from, valid_until, sensitivity.
supports/refines/contradicts edges replace same-subject heuristics.
Evidence refs must resolve before claim becomes supported/promoted.
Tests for contradiction, unsupported, expired, sensitive.

goals.objective: Lineage resolver APIs for forward/reverse graph traversal.
acceptance_criteria: Forward and reverse traversal APIs exist.
Dashboard card summaries from graph traversal.
Graph traversal respects permission scope.
Tests for panel-to-memory and lease-to-claim lineage.

goals.objective: Runner manifests auto-written for all action types (skip, stop, kill, timeout, drain).
acceptance_criteria: autoWriteManifest covers all action types.
Manifests include stdout/stderr/artifact refs and token usage.
Before/after checkpoint refs around worker execution.
Tests for timeout, killed, drain manifests.

goals.objective: Live scheduler with fair-share weights, concurrency slots, budgets, process-aware stop/kill.
acceptance_criteria: Configurable fair-share weights with starvation protection.
Runtime concurrency slots per adapter and risk class.
Token/wall-clock/retry/failure budgets enforced before worker start.
Circuit breaker wired into startNextWorker.
Tests for fair-share, budgets, stop/kill evidence.

goals.objective: OKF skill sync, hypothesis workbench, specialist profile versions.
acceptance_criteria: OKF skill roots indexed into capability candidates.
Sync dry-run by default; explicit apply required.
Hypothesis entities with evidence plan, falsification, stop condition.
Panel-to-backlog and hypothesis-to-goal projection without workers.

goals.objective: Mission Control drill-through from metrics to evidence records.
acceptance_criteria: Drill-through links from dashboard metrics to capabilities, claims, panels, leases, traces, manifests.
Gated operator actions for OKF validate, sync, close learning.
Latest learning outcome panel with score delta.

acceptance_criteria: CodexExecutor uses exec --json --cd.
Shared runtime contract probe extracted.
Contract fixtures for available/drifted/unavailable.
codex-executor.test.ts passes.

goals.objective: OKF allowlist, scoped permissions, typed claims, manifest spoofing tests.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical OKF/workspace root allowlist.
Governance resolves persisted refs.
Direct public assertion of completed manifests blocked.

opencode mcp list with timeout and status classification.

goals.objective: ProofRunService creating rollback-scoped demo records across all tables.
acceptance_criteria: ≥6 capabilities, 1 panel with ≥3 reviews, ≥3 typed claims, 1 backlog+goal, 1 loop+≥2 leases.
Mock maker/checker execution with traces, checkpoints, manifests, memory candidate.
Proof-run metadata on every record.

goals.objective: Proof run API endpoints and npm scripts.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/swarms/proof-runs starts mock proof run.
GET /api/swarms/proof-runs/:id returns status and evidence.
POST /api/swarms/proof-runs/:id/rollback deletes proof-scoped records.
npm run swarm:proof and npm run swarm:proof:rollback scripts exist.

goals.objective: Mission Control proof output section with live counts and evidence links.
acceptance_criteria: Proof summary section shows live vs required counts.
Latest proof-run id, status, rollback status visible.
Links to created records.
Missing evidence shown as blocking facts.
Dashboard smoke test passes.

goals.objective: Live workstation proof smoke: zero-state → proof → nonzero → rollback.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-run zero-state captured.
Proof run creates nonzero output across all required tables.
Post-run counts captured.
Rollback deletes only proof-scoped records.
Dashboard screenshot/browser smoke captured.

goals.objective: Pi executor: JSON event mapping, cancel, e2e sovereign run, docs.
acceptance_criteria: JSON-mode maps events to TASK_STARTED/TOOL_CALL/LOG/TASK_COMPLETED/TASK_FAILED.
cancel() SIGTERM-then-SIGKILL.
E2E sovereign run with zero external egress.
docs/integrations.md Pi status updated to Verified.

acceptance_criteria: 'pi' added to runtime union sites and RuntimeContract.
getRuntimeContract('pi') probes binary with cache TTL.
buildRuntimeCommand('pi') returns correct headless args.
message.usage parsed into worker lease runtime usage.
Tests for Pi runtime command, contract, usage.

goals.objective: Docs, contract capture, loop resume, skill validation.
acceptance_criteria: Docs document Ruflo as inspiration only.

acceptance_criteria: Scoped commit with no secrets.
